schoolActivation.title: Activate school account
schoolActivation.description: Please select the school you belong to so we can send an activation request. Our support team will contact you.
schoolActivation.infoAlert: The activation request will be sent to Nawabegh Academy administration, and the school will be contacted to complete activation.

school.label: School name
school.hint: Only schools registered in the system are shown.

messages.submitSuccess: Activation request sent successfully. Our support team will contact you soon.
messages.submitError: Could not send activation request. Please try again.

support.label: For technical support, contact us on WhatsApp
